result.stdout:
Guitar tab CLI
USAGE: VaughanCLI [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    chord, -c <options>   Specify a chord
    chords, -cs <options> Specify a list of chords
    voicelead, -v <options>
                          Specify a list of chords
    scale, -s <options>   Specify a scale
    arpeggio, -a <options>
                          Specify an arpeggio
    commonscales, -scs <options>
                          Find common scales for a specified a list of chords
    scalesforchord, -sc <options>
                          Find scales that contain all chord tones of a chord

    Use 'VaughanCLI <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
Guitar tab CLI
USAGE: VaughanCLI [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    chord, -c <options>   Specify a chord
    chords, -cs <options> Specify a list of chords
    voicelead, -v <options>
                          Specify a list of chords
    scale, -s <options>   Specify a scale
    arpeggio, -a <options>
                          Specify an arpeggio
    commonscales, -scs <options>
                          Find common scales for a specified a list of chords
    scalesforchord, -sc <options>
                          Find scales that contain all chord tones of a chord

    Use 'VaughanCLI <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

result.stdout:
Guitar tab CLI
USAGE: VaughanCLI chord [--help] [--chord <string>]
                        [--bass <third|fourth|fifth|sixth>]
                        [--shape <closed|drop2|drop3>]
                        [--inversion <root|first|second|third>]

OPTIONS:

    --chord, -c <string>  Specify a root note.
    --bass, -b <third|fourth|fifth|sixth>
                          specify a guitar bass string for the chord.
    --shape, -s <closed|drop2|drop3>
                          Specify a chord form.
    --inversion, -i <root|first|second|third>
                          specify a chord inversion.
    --help                display this list of options.

    --bass, -b <third|fourth|fifth|sixth>
                          specify a guitar bass string for the chord.
    --shape, -s <closed|drop2|drop3>

                          specify a chord inversion.
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
Guitar tab CLI
USAGE: VaughanCLI scale [--help] [--scale <string>] [--minfret <int>]
                        [--maxfret <int>]

OPTIONS:

    --scale, -s <string>  Specify a scale.
    --minfret, -min <int> specify the minimum fret for the scale.
    --maxfret, -max <int> specify the maximum fret for the scale.
    --help                display this list of options.

    --maxfret, -max <int> specify the maximum fret for the scale.
